commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Aaron lifted up his hand toward the people, and blessed them, and came down from offering of the sin offering, and the burnt offering, and peace offerings. Thus representing the form of a cross, on which Christ redeemed us; in memory of which we still make the same sign. (Worthington) Them. The blessing is recorded, Numbers vi. And the Lord bless thee (Menochius) In blessing an individual, the priest laid his hands upon him; but he stretched them out towards the multitude, as a mark of superiority.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
